summary: Save Calculation as Project feature fully tested and verified. Backend API endpoint POST /api/v1/carbon/projects/from-calculation is working correctly. Frontend Save as Project button appears after calculation, dialog opens with pre-populated fields, and projects are saved to database and appear in portfolio.
seed_data_creation: Test projects cleaned up after testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Save Calculation as Project feature fully implemented and tested. Backend endpoint: POST /api/v1/carbon/projects/from-calculation accepts portfolio_id, project_name, methodology_code, annual_credits, country_code. Frontend: Save as Project button appears in Calculator results card (data-testid='save-as-project-btn'), dialog has portfolio select (data-testid='save-portfolio-select'), project name input (data-testid='save-project-name-input'), country select (data-testid='save-country-select'), submit button (data-testid='save-project-submit-btn'). Success confirmation shows checkmark and 'Project Saved!' message.
passed_tests: TestSaveCalculationAsProject::test_save_calculation_with_different_countries - US, BR, IN, CN, DE, AU all work
Carbon Credits page loads at /carbon route
Methodology dropdown (ACM0002) with input fields present
Calculation Results card shows: methodology, version, sector, annual emission reductions
Save as Project button (data-testid='save-as-project-btn') appears after calculation
Save dialog opens with Portfolio dropdown pre-selected
Project Name input pre-populated with methodology name
Calculation Summary shows methodology code and tCO2e/year
Success confirmation with checkmark and 'Project Saved!' message
Projects tab shows saved project with correct name, type, standard, credits
Portfolio KPIs update after project added (Total Annual Credits, NPV)
